description: §38.11 clean neg — the identical channel with a fully static `name="chat-general"` (no `${...}`) fires NO E-CHANNEL-* diagnostic. The delta from `channel/name-interpolated` is removing the interpolation marker, which silences E-CHANNEL-007 (VP-3).
rationale: §38.3: a static-literal `name=` is the well-formed form — VP-3 finds no `${` marker, so E-CHANNEL-007 (and the E-CHANNEL-* family) stays silent.
